source.title: The hippocampal-VTA loop: controlling the entry of information into long-term memory.

confidence_rationale: Circuit anatomy (subiculum -> NAc -> VP -> VTA -> dopamine) is exactly what ARC-028 instantiates. High source quality and mapping fidelity for the anatomical pathway. Confidence capped at 0.70 because the signal in this paper is novelty detection, not trajectory completion -- the biological function being mapped differs from REE's use case.
failure_signatures: The hippocampal signal conveyed through this pathway is novelty-based (mismatch detection), not trajectory-completion. If ARC-028's completion signal is fundamentally different in character from a novelty signal, the same pathway may not transmit it reliably.
The upward arm of the loop (VTA dopamine back to hippocampus for LTP) is the paper's primary focus; the downward arm (hippocampus -> VTA activation) is described but less empirically grounded.

mapping.source_claim_statement: The hippocampus detects newly arrived information not already in long-term memory (novelty signal), which travels subiculum -> NAc -> VP -> VTA, contributing to dopaminergic firing; VTA dopamine then feeds back to hippocampus to enhance LTP and learning.
mapping.ree_translation: ARC-028 requires HippocampalModule to emit a trajectory completion signal that travels via the analogous subiculum -> NAc -> VP -> VTA pathway, causing dopamine release, which suppresses BG beta oscillations (BetaGate release) to allow the next action selection cycle.
mapping.mapping_caveat: The biological signal is novelty (mismatch detection in CA1 between expectation and reality), not goal/trajectory completion. ARC-028 repurposes the same anatomical loop for a different computational event. Whether completion signals are transmitted via the same route, or require a distinct pathway (e.g., direct subicular projections to striatum for reward-related sequences), is not resolved here.
mapping.source_context: Theoretical review grounded in rodent hippocampal physiology; human relevance inferred from memory studies.

confidence_components.notes: Source quality very high (Neuron, 2500+ citations, canonical reference for this circuit). Mapping fidelity penalised for novelty-vs-completion signal difference. Transfer risk low because ARC-028 is an architectural commitment, not a specific empirical prediction about rodent behavior.
